changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.comment: Grant ROYALTY_READ to VENDEUR so a seller can read (not manage) the royalty calculations/payments of their own boutique, scoped server-side via getAccessibleBoutiqueIds().
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO rel_profil_metier__permissions (profil_metier_id, permissions_id) SELECT p.id, pm.id FROM profil_metier p JOIN permission_metier pm ON pm.code = 'ROYALTY_READ' WHERE p.code = 'VENDEUR' ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;
